results.rendered_html: 1. adhogati (adhas + gati) f. der Gang nach unten, das Sinken: stokenonnatimāyāti stokenāyātyadhogatim . aho susadṛśī ceṣṭā tulāyaṣṭeḥ khalasya ca ..  PAÑCAT. I, 166 . ayaśaḥ prāpyate yena yena cādhogatirbhavet . svargācca bhraśyate yena tatkarma na samācaret .. II, 116 . der Gang zur Hölle: adhogatiṃ yā  M. 3,17 . 52 .
